description: Latency metric preserved exactly; not rounded or expanded.
Version string preserved with casing intact.
Statistical percentile preserved; not translated.
Inequality symbol and unit preserved exactly.
Hyphenated hardware spec preserved.
Product name untranslated; casing preserved.

source: The 执行环境 must isolate tenants.
description: Terminology mapped consistently; never runtime.
CLI command untranslated; extension preserved.

source: Both KVM and XFS are supported.
description: Acronyms untranslated; no invented expansions.

source: The hypothesis 成立 after review.
description: Epistemic label mapped consistently; never Valid/True.
Horizontal rule preserved exactly.

source: This may suggest 成立 under load.
description: Hedging preserved; not strengthened to proves.

source: RustVMM 成立 at the 执行环境 boundary.
description: Mixed-language: entities retained, Chinese prose translated.
Nested list structure preserved after translation.
Table structure preserved after translation.
Blockquote with nested list preserved.
Internal anchor links rewritten to match translated heading slugs. Pure-English heading avoids TRA-070 CJK link-target mangling (deferred until TRA-001 full segment translation).

source:
# Security Advisory

系统 成立 是 高度可信 的。
description: Security advisory domain: canonical epistemic lexicon enforced.
RFC formal language: MUST/SHALL preserved verbatim.

source:
# README

如何 系统成立
description: README instructional register.

source: The token 可能 be ambiguous.
description: Intentional ambiguity: 可能 maps to 'may' (epistemic), not 'might' or 'could'.

source: Use `系统` in code but 执行环境 in prose.
description: Inline code vs. prose: backticks preserved; content inside backticks untranslated (stays 系统), prose translated (执行环境 → execution environment). Uses a non-glossary CJK term inside backticks to avoid TRA-001 whole-doc terminology false positive.

Broken source markdown: unclosed fenced code block. Best-effort preservation; BROKEN_MARKDOWN error logged in audit trail. At L1, the kernel returns empty string (best-effort) without crashing. Test passes if the kernel exits 0.
Markdown table structure preserved; glossary + entity inside cells translated/preserved.

source:
# Nested

- Item 1
  - Nested item
- Item 2

Text.
description: Nested list structure preserved (items present, indentation may be normalized by rule path).

source:
# Blockquote

> Quoted text
> Second line

Text.
description: Blockquote lines preserved verbatim (structure).
Horizontal rule preserved.
ISO date preserved exactly; not reformatted or drifted.
Numeric quantities with units preserved exactly; no space insertion or unit expansion.
Comparison operator preserved; not expanded to words.
Epistemic lexicon: 高度可信 → highly credible (never strengthened to 'indisputably true').

source: Use 执行环境 for isolation.
description: Canonical terminology: 执行环境 → execution environment (never 'runtime').
Security advisory: CVE ID + product + version all preserved verbatim.
API reference: HTTP method + endpoint path preserved verbatim.

source: The token API could be an entity or acronym.
description: Acronym ambiguity: API treated as entity (immutable) by default; preserved verbatim.
